_comment: Manual corrections keyed by item.id. Fields here override scraped values after each run. Use --merge flag when running scrape.py.
_water_note: water_production_rate is scraped from the wiki 'Water Gather Rate' field (native unit: ml/s) and converted to ml/hr by the scraper (×3600). Confirmed unit from multiple sources (awakening.wiki, FextraLife). Windtrap: 0.75 ml/s → 2700 ml/hr; Large Windtrap: 1.75 ml/s → 6300 ml/hr. No overrides needed — scraper conversion is correct.
